originalBehavior: The published Get started lesson boots the Learning Synths shell, loads the RNBO-backed synth runtime, and drops straight into a playable XY pad.
localStatus: The local route keeps that lesson shell and RNBO runtime under the route tree while replacing the broader lesson chrome with local metadata and the shared footer.
notes: The archive preserves the published runtime rather than rebuilding the synth pad in a custom stack.
The route forces the stable low-quality audio mode at boot so the archived lesson can mount consistently from local assets.
evidence: Music smoke coverage verifies local script loading, the XY control update path, and note-trigger state changes on the shipped route.
The rendered lesson body rewrites localizable chapter links to shipped local synth routes after the React shell mounts.

originalBehavior: The published lesson relies on shared Learning Synths fonts, text payloads, RNBO patch data, models, and lesson WAV files around the main synth surface.
localStatus: The local route archives those first-party assets under its own tree so the synth lesson can run without remote media fetches.
notes: The archived inventory includes 12 font files, 4 shared sound assets, 5 lesson WAVs, 4 GLB models, 6 text payload JSON files, 2 preset catalogs, and 1 RNBO patch.
Route-local assets are served from relative paths for GitHub Pages subpath hosting.
evidence: Music smoke coverage asserts the expected local asset counts before interaction checks begin.
The route passes the no-remote-playable-media check inside the music smoke group.

originalBehavior: The published lesson lets users drag across an XY synth surface to change sound and trigger notes immediately.
localStatus: The local route keeps the playable XY pad and its note-trigger state while routing chapter navigation and provenance through local-only surfaces.
notes: The first synth lesson is treated as the family bootstrap and the smoke gate for the playable XY surface.
The shipped route preserves the lesson heading, chapter handoff, and in-body synth interaction instead of condensing the page into a custom wrapper.
evidence: Music smoke coverage verifies the XY control position changes and that the route enters and exits the note-trigger state cleanly.
The public shell stays responsive on narrow viewports and retains footer-only provenance after the lesson mounts.
